description.content: Retrieve the latest headlines organized by category. Available on Standard plan and above. Returns articles grouped by category with optional similar article suggestions.

query.description: Comma-separated list of country codes to filter by (e.g., us,ca,gb).
Comma-separated list of language codes to filter by (e.g., en,es,fr).
Comma-separated list of categories: general, science, sports, business, health, entertainment, tech, politics, food, travel.
Comma-separated list of domains to include.
Comma-separated list of domains to exclude.
Comma-separated list of source IDs to include.
Comma-separated list of source IDs to exclude.
Filter to articles published on a specific date (Y-m-d format).
Number of articles per category (max 10, default 6).
Include similar articles in the response (default true).

response.name: Headlines organized by category.

response.name: Forbidden - endpoint access restricted on your plan.
Too many requests - rate limit reached (60-second window).

description.content: Top stories filtered by keyword, category, and date.
Retrieve live and historical top stories globally or filtered by keyword, category, country, language, domain, or date. Supports advanced boolean search operators.

query.description: Comma-separated fields to search: title, description, keywords, main_text. Default: title,main_text.
Comma-separated country codes to filter by.
Comma-separated categories: general, science, sports, business, health, entertainment, tech, politics, food, travel.
Comma-separated language codes to filter by.
Filter to articles published before this datetime (Y-m-d\TH:i:s).
Filter to articles published after this datetime.
Filter to articles published on this exact date (Y-m-d).
Number of results per page (plan-dependent maximum).
Page number for pagination (default 1, max result set 20,000).

response.name: Too many requests - rate limit reached (60-second window).

description.content: Full historical and live article database search.
Access the complete historical and live article database. Same filtering and search capabilities as the Top Stories endpoint but covers the full news archive.

query.description: Fields to search (title, description, keywords, main_text).
Filter to articles published before this datetime.
Filter to articles published after this datetime.
Filter to articles published on this exact date.

response.name: List of news articles from the full archive.
Too many requests - rate limit reached (60-second window).

description.content: Articles similar to a given article.
Find articles similar to a specific article identified by its UUID. Returns articles ranked by relevance_score indicating similarity strength.

query.description: Comma-separated language codes to filter by.
Filter by publication date upper bound.
Filter by publication date lower bound.
Number of similar articles to return.

variable.description: (Required) UUID of the article to find similar articles for.

response.name: List of similar articles ranked by relevance score.

description.content: Available news sources and their metadata.
Retrieve available news sources and their metadata including domain, language, locale, and categories covered. Returns 50 results per page.

query.description: Comma-separated categories to filter sources by.
Comma-separated language codes to filter by.
Page number for pagination (50 sources per page).

description.content: The News API provides access to worldwide news articles and top stories from over 40,000 sources in 50 countries. Search and filter news by keyword, category, language, country, and date. All endpoints require an API token obtained by registering at thenewsapi.com.
